# Ace Data Cloud - AI Hub

> AI-powered creative hub — generate images, videos, music, and chat with leading AI models. One platform for Midjourney, Suno, Luma, Sora, GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more.

Ace Data Cloud AI Hub (hub.acedata.cloud) is a consumer-facing web application that provides easy access to 20+ AI services through a unified interface. Users can generate images, create music, produce videos, and chat with AI — all from a single platform. Available in 18 languages.

## AI Chat

- [ChatGPT](https://hub.acedata.cloud/chatgpt): Chat with OpenAI GPT models
- [Claude](https://hub.acedata.cloud/claude): Chat with Anthropic Claude
- [Gemini](https://hub.acedata.cloud/gemini): Chat with Google Gemini
- [Grok](https://hub.acedata.cloud/grok): Chat with xAI Grok
- [DeepSeek](https://hub.acedata.cloud/deepseek): Chat with DeepSeek AI

## AI Image Generation

- [Midjourney](https://hub.acedata.cloud/midjourney): Generate stunning images from text prompts
- [Flux](https://hub.acedata.cloud/flux): Fast, high-quality image generation
- [QR Art](https://hub.acedata.cloud/qrart): Generate artistic QR codes with AI
- [AI Headshots](https://hub.acedata.cloud/headshots): Professional AI-generated headshots
- [NanoBanana](https://hub.acedata.cloud/nanobanana): Image generation and editing via Gemini
- [Seedream](https://hub.acedata.cloud/seedream): Image generation by ByteDance

## AI Video Generation

- [Luma](https://hub.acedata.cloud/luma): Video generation via Dream Machine
- [Sora](https://hub.acedata.cloud/sora): Video generation by OpenAI
- [Veo](https://hub.acedata.cloud/veo): Video generation by Google
- [Pika](https://hub.acedata.cloud/pika): Creative video generation and editing
- [Kling](https://hub.acedata.cloud/kling): Video generation by Kuaishou
- [Pixverse](https://hub.acedata.cloud/pixverse): Video generation from text and images
- [Hailuo](https://hub.acedata.cloud/hailuo): Video generation by MiniMax
- [Seedance](https://hub.acedata.cloud/seedance): Dance video generation by ByteDance

## AI Music

- [Suno](https://hub.acedata.cloud/suno): Generate songs, lyrics, and music from text

## Links

- [Platform](https://platform.acedata.cloud): Developer portal with API docs and pricing
- [Documentation](https://docs.acedata.cloud): Comprehensive guides and API reference
- [GitHub](https://github.com/AceDataCloud): Open source MCP servers and clients
